taskDescription: Arrange the steps for ethical handling of a cadaver in the anatomy laboratory in the correct order.
paragraphs: Verify legal documentation — body donation form or unclaimed body authorisation under THOA 1994 or State Anatomy Act
Professor introduces the cadaver with respect, acknowledging the donor as a teacher
Students are briefed on laboratory rules — no photography, no social media, no disrespectful conduct
Cadaver is handled with dignity throughout dissection — kept draped when not being dissected
After completion, remains are cremated or buried with appropriate religious rites at the college's expense

overallFeedback.feedback: Review the material and try again.
Good effort! Review the sections you missed.
